page_content:
ANTH788 Internship Research (1-3 Credits)

This course augments ANTH 789 and is graded in conjunction with it. Prerequisite: ANTH701.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Anthropology department; and must be in one of the following programs (Anthropology (Master's); Anthropology (Doctoral)).

ANTH7839 Internship (1-6 Credits)

Individual instruction course supervised by a department faculty member. Prerequisite: ANTH701.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
